touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Kwame Lewis, Director of CS at VertexNetworks. No response received.

Brief cold call with Kwame Lewis. Introduced AskElephant's CS handoff automation capabilities. Kwame expressed preliminary interest in improving their sales-to-CS transition process and agreed to a follow-up.

questions_asked.question: What specifically does your platform do for CS handoffs?
questions_asked.answer: We automate the entire sales-to-CS transition with AI-powered deal summaries, context transfer, and workflow orchestration to eliminate information loss.

next_steps: Send overview email with case studies

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview and healthcare IT case studies. Kwame responded positively, confirming availability for qualification call next week.

questions_asked.question: Do you have experience with healthcare compliance requirements?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we're HIPAA compliant and work with several healthcare IT companies on secure data handling.

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Kwame Lewis. Discussed current pain points with manual CS handoffs causing customer confusion and delays. VertexNetworks currently uses spreadsheets and email for transitions. Kwame sees value in automation but mentioned budget constraints and need for consulting support.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for sales-to-CS handoffs?
questions_asked.answer: We use a mix of Salesforce notes and email threads. CS team often has to reach back out to sales reps for context, which delays onboarding.

questions_asked.question: How many new customers do you onboard monthly?
questions_asked.answer: About 15-20, so the inefficiency really adds up. We've had complaints from customers about the transition.

questions_asked.question: Would this require our team to change how they work in Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Minimal changes - we integrate directly with Salesforce and enhance your existing workflow.

next_steps: Prepare custom demo scenario for healthcare IT handoffs

touches.ai_summary: Demo confirmation email sent with agenda focused on VertexNetworks' specific use case. Kwame confirmed attendance and requested to see ROI metrics from similar implementations.

Product demo with Kwame Lewis. Demonstrated AI-powered deal summarization, automated CS handoff workflows, and integration with their Salesforce instance. Kwame was engaged and asked detailed questions about implementation timeline and team training. Expressed concern about getting executive buy-in without VP approval. Requested pricing for 29 seats.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 3-4 weeks including Salesforce integration, workflow customization, and team training.

questions_asked.question: What level of consulting support is included?
questions_asked.answer: Our Automations Plus Consulting package includes dedicated implementation manager and ongoing optimization support.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in the evaluation from your team?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally our VP of Customer Success, but their schedule has been difficult lately. I can champion this internally.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide pricing for our team size?
questions_asked.answer: I'll send over a proposal for 29 seats with the consulting package included.

objections: Need to figure out how to present this to leadership without VP involvement yet
next_steps: Try to schedule exec meeting with VP of CS

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Kwame Lewis (VP of CS was unable to attend - meeting was rescheduled once already). Discussed business case and ROI projections. Kwame is supportive but cautious about budget approval. Requested significant discount to make the business case stronger internally. Rep offered 32.8% discount to move deal forward.

questions_asked.question: What's your best pricing for this? Our budget is tight this quarter.
questions_asked.answer: I can work with leadership to offer a substantial discount if we can close this month.

questions_asked.question: Can we get your VP involved for final approval?
questions_asked.answer: They're swamped with a major customer escalation right now. I have authority to move forward on CS tools within budget.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the ongoing support after implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Monthly check-ins, workflow optimization, and access to our CS team for any issues.

objections: Price is higher than budgeted - need to see closer to $15k to make this work
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Sent revised proposal with 32.8% discount bringing ACV to $21,200. Outlined implementation timeline and support details. Kwame acknowledged receipt and said he's working on internal approvals.
next_steps: Check in on approval status mid-week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking on contract review status. Kwame responded that finance is reviewing but requested clarification on payment terms and whether they could extend implementation timeline to Q2.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Let me check with finance, but we may be able to accommodate quarterly billing given the discount already applied.

touches.ai_summary: Sent payment terms confirmation allowing quarterly billing. Kwame confirmed finance approval is in progress and expects to have contract signed by end of week. Still no VP involvement in final approval.
